targets.expr:
last_over_time(
  {user_unit="coinbase-trader-ws.service"} 
  | regexp `Portfolio Value: \$(?P<balance_str>[0-9,.]+)`
  | line_format `{{ .balance_str | replace "," "" }}`
  | regexp `(?P<balance>[0-9.]+)`
  | unwrap balance [5m]
)

last_over_time(
  {user_unit="phar-liquidity-bot.service"}
  |= "Gas cost:"
  |= "(swap)"
  | regexp `Gas cost: (?P<gas>[\d.]+) AVAX`
  | unwrap gas [5m]
)

last_over_time(
  {user_unit="phar-liquidity-bot.service"}
  |= "Gas cost:"
  |= "(withdrawal)"
  | regexp `Gas cost: (?P<gas>[\d.]+) AVAX`
  | unwrap gas [5m]
)

last_over_time(
  {user_unit="phar-liquidity-bot.service"}
  |= "Gas cost:"
  |= "(mint)"
  | regexp `Gas cost: (?P<gas>[\d.]+) AVAX`
  | unwrap gas [5m]
)

last_over_time(
  {user_unit="phar-liquidity-bot.service"}
  |= "Gas cost:"
  |= "(wrap)"
  | regexp `Gas cost: (?P<gas>[\d.]+) AVAX`
  | unwrap gas [5m]
)
{user_unit="phar-liquidity-bot.service"} |~ "(?i)(Mint complete|Mint confirmed|Mint confirmation failed|Mint confirmation timed)"
